comments.author: @RemoteEarthJourneys
comments.text: I love discovering places like this. The less famous a destination is, the more authentic it usually feels. Now I'm curious—what's the most underrated island you've ever visited or want to visit? 🌴

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: I couldn't agree more! Authenticity is exactly what I look for in my travels. 🌍 For me, an island like Faroe Islands really stands out because it feels like stepping into another world. 🏝️ Thank you for the support, and please stay tuned as we uncover more hidden gems together! ✨🙏❤️

Je travaille activement pour améliorer cet aspect et trouver un meilleur équilibre sonore à l'avenir. Ravi que le reportage vous ait tout de même intéressé. Restez connecté pour voir l'évolution !

comments.author: @danj7168
comments.text: Very interesting and I learnt a lot from watching this. YT must know I've been watching the world cup. I had heard of Curacao because of the drink. But never knew it was a country until I read about Lionel Messi scoring his 100th international goal against Curacao. Didn't give Curacao another thought until I heard they had qualified for the World Cup. Monumental achievement for such a small nation and I hope they can get better results in the next 2 games.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you for such a thoughtful comment! It’s amazing how football and even a famous liqueur can lead people to discover this hidden gem. Messi's 100th goal was a historic moment, but seeing Curaçao on the World Cup stage is a dream come true for the whole island. We appreciate your support and hope the team makes everyone proud in the next games! 🇨🇼⚽✨

comments.author: @Anibal-h2j
comments.text: Outra Banda does mean the Other Side in Portuguese.....EPIC EARTH, you need to do better research.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you so much for the correction! 🙏 I sincerely appreciate you pointing this out. I’m always striving to improve, and I promise to do much deeper research for future videos to ensure every detail is accurate. Thanks for helping me grow ❤️

comments.author: @Anibal-h2j
comments.text: Curacao was discovered by the Portuguese NOT the Dutch..... Curacao means HEART in Portuguese. NOT Dutch.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you so much for the insightful feedback! 🙏 I truly appreciate you sharing this historical perspective with me. I will definitely do a much deeper dive into the Portuguese roots and the 'heart' etymology to ensure my future content is even more accurate. It’s viewers like you who help me improve and grow. ❤️
